Container.Name: tagr
Container.Overview: Tagr is a self-hosted music metadata editor with a modern web UI. Browse, edit, and manage audio file tags from any browser — desktop or mobile. Just point it at your music folders and get a clean three-panel interface for organizing your library. Edit 40+ metadata fields, manage album art, fetch metadata from MusicBrainz, and more.
Container.Requires: Music files accessible on the host.

Config.Name: Database
Config.Description: Path to store the SQLite database and app data.

Config.Name: Music Folder 1
Config.Description: Path to a music folder on the host. Add more paths as needed.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container.

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Secret key for session encryption. Change this to a random string.

Config.Name: AUTH_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Login password as a bcrypt hash. Generate with: docker exec tagr node -e "require('bcrypt').hash('yourpassword',12).then(console.log)"

Config.Name: AUTH_URL
Config.Description: Public URL of the app (used by NextAuth).
